title: Introduction
text: XFA-PDF is a Laravel package for reading editing previewing and saving XFA XML Forms Architecture PDFs entirely in pure PHP. No paid dependencies. Uses DOMDocument for XML and raw binary parsing for PDF. Incremental updates. Non-destructive. Full stack PHP API Facade CLI Web UI.

title: Installation
text: Install via Composer path repository. Requires PHP 7.4 Laravel 6 ext-dom ext-zlib. Auto-discovery service provider facade. Publish config views migrations. Orchestra Testbench for testing.

title: Configuration
text: route_prefix middleware disk upload_path max_upload_size. Configure URL prefix middleware stack filesystem disk upload directory and maximum file size.

title: Quick Start
text: setFile read readField update updateField save preview. Load PDF read sections update fields save changes. Fluent section API personalDetails cpd scopeOfWork.

title: Facade API - setFile
text: setFile string filePath self. Load an XFA PDF file. Must be called before any other method.

title: Facade API - read / readField
text: read string sectionName array. readField string sectionName string fieldName string. Read all fields or single field from a section.

title: Facade API - update / save
text: update string sectionName array fields self. updateField. save string outputPath bool. Update fields and save via incremental PDF update.

title: Facade API - sections / rawXml / toArray
text: sections array. rawXml string. toArray array. fieldMetadata array. repeatableSubforms array. navigationSections array.

title: Section Proxy
text: Section proxy fluent interface. read readField update updateField getName. personalDetails scopeOfWork cpd qualityImprovement feedback.

title: Manager Internal API

text: XfaPdf value object. PdfBinaryService DOMDocument templateXml filePath. getPdf getDatasetsDom setDatasetsDom getTemplateXml setTemplateXml getFilePath.

title: PdfBinaryService
text: PdfBinaryService load loadBinary discoverStreams decompressStream extractTrailerInfo groupConsecutiveKeys writeIncrementalUpdate getDatasetStreams getBinary getFilePath. Raw PDF binary parsing stream discovery Flate decompression incremental writes.

title: DatasetService
text: DatasetService extract extractRaw getSections getFields getFieldValue setFieldValue setFieldValues toArray nodeToArray. XFA datasets XML read write namespace-agnostic XPath queries.

title: TemplateService

text: PreviewService generate renderSection renderFieldsHtml humanize resolveFieldMeta. HTML preview generation field types form controls.

title: NamespaceService
text: NamespaceService detect registerOnXPath getDataNamespace getDataPrefix getXfaNamespace getTemplateNamespace getAll. Auto-detect XML namespaces local-name XPath.
